findings.title: Remove console.log statements leaking auth/response data in production
findings.what: Lines 30 and 45 log auth token presence and full GraphQL responses to browser console. Wrap in process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development' check or remove entirely.
findings.why: Leaks sensitive auth status and API response payloads to any user opening DevTools in production.

findings.title: Merge existing heartbeat fix for bare except clause
findings.what: Line 83 has a bare except: that swallows all exceptions in check_admin_or_debug_access(). Fix exists on heartbeat/2026-04-03-fix-bare-except-in-main-py-startup but is unmerged.
findings.why: Bare except masks bugs and security issues. The fix is already written — just needs merge to main.

findings.title: Merge existing heartbeat fix for missing requests dependency
findings.what: youtube_service_rapidapi.py imports requests but it's missing from requirements.txt. Fix exists on heartbeat/2026-04-03-add-missing-requests-dependency-to-requirements-tx.
findings.why: Fresh Docker builds will fail when the YouTube service tries to import requests. Already fixed in branch, just needs merge.

findings.title: Add Next.js error boundary at app root
findings.what: Create error.tsx and global-error.tsx in frontend/src/app/ with a user-friendly fallback UI and retry button.
findings.why: No error boundaries exist — any unhandled runtime error crashes the entire app with a white screen instead of showing a recoverable fallback.

findings.title: Add aria-labels and accessible text to chat interface
findings.what: Add aria-label to the chat textarea, file input button, and emoji-only buttons (👤🤖). Add sr-only text for icon-only controls.
findings.why: Screen readers cannot identify unlabeled interactive elements, making the core chat feature inaccessible.

findings.title: Add backend test infrastructure and critical path tests
findings.what: Create tests/ directory with conftest.py, test fixtures, and tests for auth mutations (register/login), chat mutations, and the AI service fallback logic. pytest is already in requirements.txt but zero tests exist.
findings.why: The most critical paths — authentication, AI routing, and pattern management — have no test coverage. Any regression ships silently to production.

findings.title: Re-enable diagram rendering in chat with proper SVG detection
findings.what: Lines 238-266 have diagram chart rendering disabled due to duplicate rendering of both source code and rendered output. Implement a whitelist-based SVG detection that distinguishes code blocks containing SVG from actual renderable chart responses.
findings.why: Professional diagram generation is a flagship feature listed in CLAUDE.md but is currently disabled in the chat UI — users cannot see generated crochet charts.
